response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is overwhelmingly in full-stack web and mobile development, with minimal exposure to low-level hardware, system architecture, or AI infrastructure, making them a poor fit despite strong software engineering skills.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated ability to lead and teach through workshops and community initiatives
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or hardware modeling experience
Lacks exposure to AI accelerator architectures, GPU optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis
No background in hardware-software co-design or performance optimization for AI workloads
